name: Eternal Bloom Pendant
description: A delicate pendant featuring a beautifully preserved real flower, capturing nature's fleeting beauty in a timeless keepsake you can wear close to your heart.
story: Inspired by the moment a bride wanted to keep her wedding bouquet forever. Each pendant holds a real flower, carefully preserved to last a lifetime.

name: Garden Memory Ring
description: A stunning ring featuring a tiny preserved bloom encased in a crystal-clear dome, a miniature garden you carry everywhere.
story: Born from the idea that every garden holds memories worth keeping. This ring lets you carry a piece of your favorite garden with you.

name: Wildflower Charm Bracelet
description: Multiple tiny wildflowers preserved in delicate clear charms, linked together on a golden chain bracelet.
story: Each charm holds a different wildflower, telling the story of a meadow frozen in time. Perfect for those who find beauty in nature's smallest details.

name: Petal Drop Earrings
description: Teardrop-shaped earrings with preserved flower petals suspended in crystal-clear settings, catching light beautifully.
story: Designed for the woman who wants to carry a whisper of nature's elegance wherever she goes.

name: Bridal Bouquet Locket
description: Transform your wedding bouquet into a forever keepsake. This locket holds preserved petals from your most cherished flowers.
story: Created for brides who can't bear to let their bouquet wilt away. Send us your wedding flowers, and we'll preserve their beauty in this elegant locket.

name: Rose Garden Coaster Set
description: A set of four handcrafted coasters featuring real preserved rose petals, bringing nature's beauty to your table.
story: Every coaster is unique because every flower is unique. These functional art pieces turn an ordinary table into a conversation starter.

name: Lavender Fields Necklace
description: Real preserved lavender sprigs captured in a teardrop pendant. Carries the calming essence of a lavender field.
story: For those who find peace in lavender fields. This necklace holds a real sprig of lavender, preserved to keep its beauty forever.

name: Sunrise Suncatcher
description: A circular suncatcher filled with preserved wildflowers that dance with light, creating beautiful patterns on your walls.
story: Hang it in your window and watch as sunlight transforms preserved flowers into a kaleidoscope of color and shadow.

name: Botanical Art Coaster
description: A single statement coaster with an artistic arrangement of preserved ferns and tiny blooms. Functional art for your home.
story: Each coaster is individually crafted, making yours truly one-of-a-kind. A perfect blend of art and utility.

name: Moonlight Suncatcher
description: A crescent moon-shaped suncatcher with preserved night-blooming flowers, creating magical light patterns at golden hour.
story: Inspired by flowers that bloom under moonlight. This piece brings a touch of midnight garden magic to your window.

name: Memory Bouquet Frame
description: Send us your special flowers and we'll preserve them in an elegant shadow box frame. A perfect way to keep your memories alive.
story: Whether it's your wedding bouquet, anniversary roses, or a loved one's memorial flowers, we preserve your memories beautifully.

name: Anniversary Petal Box
description: A handcrafted wooden keepsake box with a preserved flower lid, perfect for storing love letters, rings, or tiny treasures.
story: Every anniversary deserves to be remembered. This box preserves the flower from your celebration right on its lid.

name: Baby's First Bloom
description: Capture baby's birth month flower in a beautiful preserved ornament. A keepsake that grows more precious with every year.
story: New parents cherish every moment. This keepsake preserves the birth month flower as a beautiful reminder of the day everything changed.

name: Memorial Garden Stone
description: Transform funeral flowers into a lasting tribute. A polished stone with preserved petals embedded, honoring your loved one's memory.
story: Grief and beauty intertwined. This memorial stone holds the preserved flowers from a farewell, keeping their memory blooming forever.

name: Daisy Chain Anklet
description: Tiny preserved daisies linked along a delicate gold chain anklet. Summer's essence captured in jewelry.
story: Remember making daisy chains as a child? This anklet captures that carefree joy in preserved blooms you can wear.

name: Forget-Me-Not Studs
description: Delicate forget-me-not flowers preserved in tiny round stud earrings. A meaningful gift for someone you never want to forget.
story: The forget-me-not flower has symbolized remembrance for centuries. These studs carry that beautiful tradition forward.

name: Rainbow Petal Suncatcher
description: A spectrum of colorful preserved petals arranged in a circular suncatcher, painting your room with nature's own rainbow.
story: We collected petals from seven different flowers, each representing a color of the rainbow, to create this joyful piece.

name: Love Letter Keepsake
description: Combine a handwritten love letter with preserved flowers from a special occasion. An heirloom that tells your unique love story.
story: Words and flowers together create the most powerful memories. Send us both, and we'll create a keepsake that captures your love story.
